root_cause: AO Atlas recommendation readbacks recorded supervisor.min_minutes but final_response_allowed only checked node counts. A 40/40 completed wave could close after about 22 minutes because elapsed lease time was not part of the final gate.
repair_summary: Added started_at, completed_at, elapsed_minutes, min_minutes_met, and lease_time_status to recommendation readbacks.
Changed final response gating so completed recommendation nodes require min_minutes_met before closure.
Added CLI timing flags for recommendation readback and complete-node flows.
Extended production readiness to reject final-allowed long-run evidence when elapsed_minutes is below supervisor.min_minutes.
Corrected v04 evidence so 40/40 completed nodes with 22 elapsed minutes remain in progress and final response is denied.

corrected_evidence.exact_next_action: Generate and execute the next useful Atlas recommendation wave until elapsed_minutes meets supervisor.min_minutes, or record a true hard blocker.
